1.content:
It was the first day of school at Cliffendale Boarding school. And it was a big day for all involved as it was the first day in 7 years that the school would be Co-ed. Many rumors floated around about the reason for it becoming an only girls school, the most commonly known being the disappearance of an entire bus with boys who were supposedly on a school trip.

Despite this Cliffendale had an excellent reputation for education and the chance for these boys to be a part of that was one that couldn't be passed up, with several scholarships offered as an incentive to enroll. This was offered to many boys in orphanages and rough households, to offer them a better chance at an education.

All of the students where gathered into the gymnasium for orientation day. The boys are seated on the left hand side and the girls all on the right all in the uniform of Cliffendale. The Principal mounts the podium, an attractive woman in her early 40's wearing a lavender blouse, black pencil skirt, black stockings and a pair of pumps her name being Patricia Garnier. Next to him is a middle aged man in his 30's, the new vice principal Jack Paris. Miss Garnier clears her throat and begins.

"Welcome to Cliffendale Academy, thus begins another year at our illustrious institution and a first year to our new students" Indicating the boys to her right.
"now I implore you to get to know one another as you will be relying on each other in more ways than you can think of this coming time at Cliffendale, and I expect the best of behavior from all of you. And I promise that you boys will be in good hands here as you adjust to our school. And I implore you girls to take good care of our boys, so please be gentle"
She smiles, and all of the girls chuckle or giggle to themselves. The boys do as well at the obvious attempt at humor.
"now before we finish up our assembly I implore each of you to take the next 5 minutes to get to know one another as you will all be getting better acquainted very soon"

She steps back from the podium indicating that they all get up and mingle

The boys and girls rise and begin to pair off with one another to mix and mingle.

After the Five minutes are up She mounts the Podium again and begins again.

"Now that you have gotten to know one another then we can get this year started. Now there is going to be one more 'little' thing we have to take care of" she says this and all the girls laugh at it. "and a 'big' change for you boys" again the girls laugh at the joke. The boys however look around perplexed.

Miss Garnier removes a pendant from inside her blouse and raises it up in the air and says what sounds like some kind of prayer or chant, all of the girls joining in.

"We gather together to offer these to you, the one who keeps the scales, who takes and gives equally. Now take the size of those we have brought"

As they say this a purple circle appears on the ground dimly glowing. The Boys within the circle begin to dwindle in size until they are reduced to the size of action figures, each roughly between 5 to 6 inches in height.

The Principle continues her speech "Alright girls, take your pick. but be gentle with them and I don't want to hear about any of them being hurt or heaven forbid killed. And as for you boys, well, this is gonna be a big year for you so I suggest you mind the girls if you know what's good for you. And I wish you all an excellent term and I hope to see you all in class" She walks down from the podium ending her speech.

(now choose which characters story to follow descriptions of the named characters in the beginning of the story)
1.title: Intro

choices: Another girl steps in and catches him (readers choice)
11.content:
During the mix and mingling Lucy walked up to a pair of boys, Jake and Kenny. after sizing them up she says "you'll do"
Kenny, who was a rather self centered Jock type and self declared ladies man responds. "of course I will, I'm Kenny and I'm what all the ladies want" he says bluntly and haughtily.

"ah, Kenny" Lucy says "looks like you've certainly got a big ego, though your ego should match your name very soon" she says smiling.

she turns to Jake "and what's your name Cutie?"

"I'm Jake, and don't mind my friend Kenny he's a bit full of himself. How we became friends is beyond me" he smiles, Kenny gives him a dirty look.

"hmmm, I think I'm going to like you. You really are adorable" she says licking her lips. which makes Jake oddly uncomfortable.

Kenny butts in "Hey, if you want anyone how about a real man over here" He flexes his muscles.

she looks over at him with a sneer "hopefully soon we'll see that attitude of yours cut down to size 'big man'"

They are interrupted as Miss Garnier's announcement, Lucy Joins in the group chant and the boys look around with confusion. Jake and Kenny see a strange purple circle appear on the ground around them.

he looks over at Lucy and asks "what is happening?" to which she replies "oh you'll see 'shortly" she says with a snicker. and she is right as the world seems to expand and he get a sensation not dissimilar to going down on an elevator but much more pronounced and much stranger.

"am I shrinking or are you growing?" Jake asks

"you're shrinking" she answers.

Jake looks over at Kenny and see's he's in the same boat, but it seems to be effecting him more because he seems out of it, staggering around like he's drunk. looking back at Lucy he is even with the hem of her skirt.

"now don't be looking up my skirt you perv". she says with a massive grin "you don't want to make me mad do you?" she steps close to him to where at his dwindling height not looking up her skirt becomes very difficult.
Jake is now below Lucy's knee, eye level with her black sock.

it is at this point that Kenny regained his composure somewhat and tried to stagger away. "where do you think you're going little man" Lucy says, stepping away from you towards Kenny. with two steps she gained on him, now no larger than a ken doll. she simply reached down and grabbed him around his torso with one hand lifting his struggling form off the ground with him yelling in a constant stream "put me down, let me go, I'm afraid of heights you're squeezing me, stop!" all of this only succeeded in amusing her.

"not so tough now, huh Kenny? I told you your ego would be cut down to size, but I forgot to mention the rest of you would go right along with it!" she laughs at his struggles against her hand "your name fits now, nothing more than a little Ken doll!" she says punctuating that with a poke to his head.

Jake was still frozen in place when she turned to him. "you don't want to be my little pet Jake? well that's too bad because you're just too cute like that to pass up." getting down on one knee she quickly reached for his running form.

is Jake fast enough to avoid being caught by Lucy or will he be caught
11.title: Lucy, Jake, and Kenny

Jake's diminutive legs prove to be ineffective as the horizontal tree trunk size fingers slam in front of him then wrap around him immobilizing him. He quickly feels a jerk in his gut like an express elevator as he is lifted up in the air. Not learning the lesson Kenny had experienced Jake futilely struggles and squirms in her fist. but is unable to to even budge a finger which constricts around his arms from his shoulder down to his thighs.

"you little guys just don't learn your lesson, you just can't escape my grip". she demonstrates this by gently squeezing you, not enough to hurt but enough to put a stop to his squirming. "that's a good Jakey wakey" she says with a sing song voice like talking to toddler or a small animal.

"that one is a real cutie" Jules says giving Jake's body a poke.

"yeah I think so to. I see you've been busy"

Jules is carrying a carrying a carrying case/cage which already had five boys trapped inside.

"hey, miss Garnier said we could take one or more, and there are more boys than girls at this school anyways."Jules responds

"yeah, but I think I only want to keep one of these two, guess I'm not as friendly as you".

"the more the merrier, I just like the idea having a bunch of these little suckers to play with. I could use them for my entertainment, or to just pamper me, I do love a good foot rub." she gives her little cage a shake "isn't that right little guys" she giggles.

"sounds like you want them to be little slaves to me, I just want one cute little pet to play with."

"I'll take one of them off of you if you want, like I said the more the merrier."
"sounds like a deal, I think you can have.....

Kenny doesn't like this one bit and his squirming starts up again but more intense.

Jules lifts up her basket to receive the struggling Kenny. Lucy extends her hand and drops Kenny in the basket with little ceremony. He lands in a heap and quickly jumps up and starts shaking the bars of the cage.

"don't worry he'll soon be calling me queen Jules by the time I'm through with him."

"see ya Jules"

choices: no one's there, earn his keep
11111111.content:
"lets go to my room and get better acquainted."
after a long pounding journey down hallways she soon comes to the door of her room. she opens the door and walks in, she kicks off her shoes. Jake takes a look around the room, it's a standard dorm room with two beds and various things strewn about that make it clear that two young women live in this space.
Lucy walks over and plops down on her bed, and props herself up with her pillow. She brings Jake up to her face, bringing her other hand up she deposits him on her waiting palm, leaving him saying in her open palm like a recliner.
"so this is my room, and yours too now, you'll grow to think of it as home and learn to like being my toy." she says with a wide grin "now, I have some ground rules for you, first you have to do whatever I say cause I'm in charge, second I'll pick you up whenever I like and do whatever I like, and third you're gonna have to earn your keep in some way"
"Why do I have to be your toy? it's wrong, I'm a person! can't you just let me go?" Jake responds loudly.
she lifts Jake up to her smirking face right to her bright green eyes.
"whether you like it or not this is how it is, would you rather fend for yourself at that size? I don't think so you're my little toy and I'm essentially your master. I'm going to keep you and take you out and play with you and you're going to earn your keep as well. if memory serves you said you where something of an artist? then you can paint my nails consider them like canvases for you".
she reaches in with her hand gripping his leg between her forefinger and thumb, lifting him up high above her head leaving him dangling upside down from her fingers. he begins flailing
"what are you doing! put me down! put me down! I'm afraid of heights!"
Lucy begins laughing at his little struggles "just look at you, you are just so adorable I could just eat you up". she gets a wicked grin across her face.
she then lowers him towards her mouth and opens it up wide. she lowers his body to where his head goes just inside her mouth, he gets a rush of warm moist air with a hint of mint toothpaste. Jake is truly terrified at this point. Lucy pulls him out and brings him to her face giggling uncontrollably at him, "you should see your face! priceless!"
"I thought you where going to try and eat me! don't do that again!" Jake yells.
"and just how are you gonna stop me my little toy?"
she then shifts to sitting cross legged and lowers Jake into the ring created by her legs. He was surrounded on all sides with stocking clad legs behind and pleated skirt in front of him just covering her crotch, with her monolithic body rising up into the air with her head resting in her hand as she looks down smiling like a child with a brand new toy.
"what should I do with you now?" she said "you could get started on earning your keep by painting my nails, or I could show you where you're gonna be sleeping, or we could cuddle and take a nap together." he then hears a door open in the distance is it someone coming in?
11111111.title: play time in her room

1112.content:
Will quickly regains his composure after his bout of dizziness. He looks around as the world stops spinning. but something seems to be off, "was the gym always this big?" as he continues to turn around he's confronted with the largest shoe he had ever seen. it was a brown ankle high boot with a dark pink bow. He thinks to himself "weren't those the shoes that Hannah was wearing?" his gaze follows from the shoe up a long tapered leg with a white stocking, to the hem of a dark grey pleated skirt past a pair of pert breasts to the smiling face of Hannah looking down at the now doll sized Will standing by her feet.

It is at this point that they are interrupted by Miss Clark's announcement. They both turn and listen carefully. after it was over Hannah speaks up.

"well, Will, what do you think? Would you like to come with me?" she says this giving one of her genuine smiles. "it won't be like Miss Clark said with us, I wouldn't think of you as a pet or a toy, but more like a..." she paused putting a finger on her chin thinking for a moment "like a travel sized friend!" she says giggling at the thought "well?" she asks.
Taking a look around at what is happening with the other girls, all things considered if he had to spend a year shrunk, Hannah would be the one he would choose to spend it with. "yes" he says "who knows maybe this could be fun, I mean I will never have to worry about there not being enough food, but where will I sleep maybe we could get a doll house that I could live in...." he continues to spiral into a ramble to which Hannah responded with a small chuckle. his rambling was interrupted as Hannah crouched down. "hows about we go to my room at the dorm and hang out a bit, or we could go somewhere else." she lowers her hand down palm up.
"hop on" she said smiling. Will walks over to her hand, pausing for a moment, hesitant.
"don't worry little Will, I won't drop you... probably." laughing.
Will rolls his eyes "haha very funny. it's just this is a lot to take in, in more ways than one."
"well might as well start here" she says "you're going to have to get used to be picked up and carried, I don't want to have to be waiting til next week for you to catch up with those itty bitty legs of yours."
"allright, here goes" Will walks up to her hand, turns around and sits on the center of her palm, situating himself like sitting in a recliner. "wow, your hands are so warm and soft."
"I'll take that as a compliment little Will" she says "alright elevator going up!"
He feels a tug in his gut like an express elevator, forcing his head back somewhat from the force. "whooooa!" he says as he rushes upward.
after her hand comes to a stop Will sits himself back up, finding himself held in front of her smiling face, her big amber eyes.
"looks like I've got you in the palm of my hand!" she says with a smile
taking an uneasy look over the side of her hand to what seemed like a 30 foot drop to him. "like I said don't drop me"
"don't worry I won't, but if it'll make you feel better I'll do this" she then used her free hand to recline Will with his head at her fingers, then resting her thumb across his abdomen "now you've got something to hold onto, and keep you still" she said matter-of-factly "comfortable?" she asked
"very" he said
she smiled again "I mean if you want, I could just hold you in my fist like a doll"
that didn't sound as pleasant to Will "yeah, no thanks"
"or maybe I could put you in my pocket" indicating her breast pocket "you could be my pocket pal!" she said giggling. "or I could stick you between my boobs!"
she burst out laughing as Wills face turned beat red with embarrassment.
"the look on your face is priceless right now, don't worry we're not quite that close yet, but we'll see." she said winking.
"well, lets get going. we can go to my dorm room and talk for a bit one on one, watch some tv and talk. or we could go and get something to eat if you're hungry. or we could meet up with my friends Katie and Brooke (new character). what sounds good to you?"
1112.title: Will / Hannah

11131.content:
When the Shrinking hit, Joey was close to the rows of chairs. He ran for cover from the titanic girls walking around, hiding behind the leg of a chair. when he thinks the coast is clear he tries to move to another hiding place. he then watches as a massive foot and white stocking clad leg slam in his path. he looks up the whit stocking to dark brown and toned leg to the dark grey skirt up past a pair of ample breasts barely contained by her grey sweater. he looked up into the the face of Keysey with a rather domineering and pleased face. her hair was large and curly being held back by a teal ribbon. she already had a shrunken boy held clutched in her fist wriggling vigorously to get free.
"well hey there little man, I think I recognize you you're Joey right?"
Joey stood there shaking barely able to manage a nod.
"well you're coming with me, I hope you're more cooperative than little Phillip here." giving him a little squeeze.
"but they all end up listening to goddess Keysey, and that's how you'll address me from now on"
she then reaches out towards Joey who is frozen like a deer in the headlights. He begins to panic as her fingers wrap around his body like anacondas, he begins to struggle against her over sized hand.
"now now Joey, none of that, you'll learn your place soon enough, they all do eventually. Goddess Keysey always gets what she wants, I got what I wanted from some of the shy girls and I can definitely get what I want from tiny doll sized boys. Now lets go and meet up with my crew, they're a group of girls who have come to my way of things. they didn't come today but they're going to help me take care of you little guys."
she then tucked them both in her breast pockets.
"lets see I could see if I can round up a few more of you tinies, or take you to meet my girls"
11131.title: Joey / Keysey

111331.content:
Arnold was still trying to get away from Adeline who was furiously looking for him to lay into him when the shrinking hit. as soon as he knew what was going on he hid behind one of the garbage cans along the wall. He was here during Miss Clark's speech. he watched shortly while all the now gigantic girls milled about snatching up the now doll size boys. He thought to himself that he could either stay behind the trash can and most definitely be caught, or he could make a run for it, dodging through the forest of female feet and grasping hands and maybe make it to the exit. given those options he knew he had but one choice.
Waiting for what looked like his best opening he made his move. He sprinted harder than he had for a long time, avoiding being stepped on by the skin of his teeth on two occasions. Soon the exit sign came in sight, fixating on that he dug in for the final stretch.
He quickly tries to stop himself as a massive brown leather shoe with buckles slams down in his path. He couldn't cancel out his momentum however and he slams into her dark stocking clad ankle. laying sprawled on the ground he picked himself up and looked up. his eyes tracked the long dark stocking up to a knee past the hem of this girls skirt, along her slender body and finally on the face of Adeline. And she has a truly evil grin across her face.
"well well well, look what we have here" her hands are on her hips "a leetle belette, zis size truly fits now"
Arnold quickly tries to make a break for it, of all the girls to be caught by, she was surely the worst right now. However he doesn't make it very far as he finds her other foot slamming in front of him, once again blocking his path. with a quick flick of her foot he is sent sprawling. He quickly sees her foot rise up over him, his hands go up in a futile defense. "no don't step on me!" he yells. her foot descends on his body pinning him to the floor with only his head just poking out looking up at Adelines face poking past her breasts.
"right where a belette like you belongs, under my foot"
Arnold pushes and struggles as hard as he can, but he can't budge this giant foot from his body.
"kees my foot, and I might let you up belette"
Arnold continues to struggle "I'm not going to kiss your foot!" "let me up you're crushing me!"
"you are a stupid one, deed your brain shrink smaller than it was? now, kees my foot!" she increases the pressure on his body, not enough to seriously hurt him but enough to demonstrate his predicament.
he quickly began repeatedly kissing the toe section of her shoe as fast as he can.
she smiles "zat is a good leetle belette" her foot lifts up off his body and he takes a deep breath as the pressure lets up. he slowly gets up to his feet, but he has little time to adjust as his quickly engulfed into Adelines grip as she snatches him up off the ground, her anaconda like fingers wrapping around his body pinning his arms to his side, his head poking out of the top of her fist with his legs dangling down below. He feels a tug in his gut as he is quickly lifted up to her face right at the level of her vivid blue eyes. she shifts opens her hand and reaches in with her opposite hand.
"everyone got to see my underwear weeth zat stunt you pulled" reaching in easily overpowering his futile struggles "now we are going to see yours, no more clothes for you, belette don't deserve to wear clothes. but not to worry I'll let you keep your undrpants."
Arnold tries in vain to kick out at her grasping fingers as she grasps his pants pulling them off so fast they rip "oops, sorry about zat" she says not meaning it. she then grabs his foot between her thumb and forefinger lifting him up dangling upside down in front of her smiling face. The fingers of her free hand reaching in pulling off first his brown leather jacket then his shirt. leaving him all but naked, dangling upside down from her fingers. she laughed maniacally as she poked his flailing body with her finger, thoroughly enjoying his futile attempts to ward her off her finger.
"zis year is going to be alot of fun for me" she says grinning ear to ear "but not for you I should think." laughing in an intentionally over the top manner.
"now where should I put you to carry you so I can take you somewhere I can have some real fun playing with you." she says thinking intensely "lets see, I could simply carry you in my hand, but that's not as fun. maybe my pocket? or I could put tuck you in my stocking or buckle you in my shoe. decisions decisions."
111331.title: Arnold / Adeline

choices: meet up with other girls (can be established or new characters)
1113331.content:
Jack was being nearly buried by the amount of talk Lori was launching at him. Getting more and more intense and in his face. no matter how much he tried to deflect conversation her talk continued to come, to the point where his head seemed like it was spinning. info.brief_description: It's going to be a big year for the boys at Cliffendale boarding school.
info.description:
This is a giantess shrinking story. while it is not explicitly sexual in nature that will be a feature, however anything particularly explicit and outrageous I will remove at my discression. Some things I don't want to see added to this are vore, crush (or major violence), no toilet stuff (it's just gross), some feet interaction is fine but is not the main focus. This is largely a gentle story with a significant amount of teasing and playfulness with a hint of domineering attitude (the shrunken guys can be treated as slaves and pets). Lot's of hand held would be great, that's what I like. also try and use decent grammar (I'm not a nazi about it or anything just make sure it is readable and easy to follow). also keep profanity to a minimum, it doesn't bother me but don't fill your sentences with it to an extreme extent.

okay now that that's out of the way.... on to the plot!

This Story occurs within the expanded world I am writing that is called "The Big Sisterhood" in which an organization has gained power and influence through the means of a contract with an interdimensional entity. The price being the size of living humans, males to be specific. the men who are selected as "sacrifices" are reduced through a predetermined ritual that leaves them at roughly 5"-6". They are usually then kept or distributed as more or less pets and toys.

within this system the organization, known colloquially as "The Big Sisterhood Foundation" runs a number of academies for the daughters of the foundations members, and as places to obtain male "sacrifices" this includes the sons as well, though many wouldn't be aware of the practice.

This story occurs at one of these Academies called Cliffendale boarding school, which had been an all girls school for the past 7 years until they made the decision to make it co-ed, ostensibly to be more inclusive and to offer opportunities for superior education. However this is a means for them to shrink them down. the mass of them then taken by the various girls as pets and their 'disappearance' explained and covered up. These boys are kept as pets, toys, slaves, or little friends or boyfriends by these girls, most of whom are aware of it in advance.

here's a brief intro to the characters in question:

Characters - Boys

Benjamin - (18) 5'9" (class officer) perfect straight A student, clean cut and well mannered, is a bit of a prude.

Steven - (18) 6'3" basketball player, African American. very friendly and open with everybody, makes friends easily.

William (Will) - (18) 5'10" black hair, funny, charming, very smart well rounded guy, prone to spacing out and saying random things on his mind.

Jake - (17) 6'1" (normally). fairly average if a bit awkward and a bit on the
skinny side with light brown hair. loves to draw (very artistic) relatively athletic .

Kenny - (16) 5'10" popular kid, blonde athletic and extroverted (but narcissistic, and easily offended by pricks at his ego). thinks he's a lady's man.

Joey - (15) 5'8" socially awkward painfully introverted, a little on the bigger side (not fat) wears glasses. half-latin

Jack - (18) 5'11" red head, rather distant, has a few acquaintances but few close friends. keeps people at arms length, finds it difficult to form intimate relationships.

Arnold - (16) 6'1" light brown hair, a bit of a joker and a prankster. always sarcastic and rarely serious.

Anthony - (16) 6'2" Arnolds fraternal twin brother, but the responsible one who constantly has to get him out of trouble. is often too nice and will do anything for anyone and is very reliable.

Kevin - (17) 5'11" red brown hair, a very muscular body builder. He is a very macho man who is a bit of a work out nut who revels in being a big tough strong guy.

Characters - Girls (8)

Katherine / Katie - (18) 5'6" brunette, cutest girl in the school, loves to try new things, very adventurous.

Becca - (18) 6' blonde, tallest girl in the school, rather thin, not big chested but not small either, flirty and very forward.

Lucy - (17) 5'6" strawberry blonde, bustiest girl in the school (loves teasing, very playful personality)

Adeline - (17) 5'6", french shoulder length dark red hair, very forward and opinionated, will hold a grudge.

Brianna (bree, or anna) - (17) 5'4", cute, short brown hair, genuinely friendly (would be very gentle/caring)

Julia "Jules" - (17) 5'6", blonde, sporty. she can be demanding and likes to be in charge. but enjoys being pampered.

Keysey - (16) 5'7", african american, athletic, almost muscular (can be very domineering/demanding)

Lori - (15) 5'6", brunette pigtails, very huggy/clingy, loves small and cute things, just very 'cutesie' in general.
